## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Test plan

- [ ] `swift build` clean
- [ ] `swift test` passes (current count: 58)
- [ ] If parser change: real-byte regression fixture added under `Tests/R10KitTests/Fixtures/`
- [ ] If public API change: motivated in summary, source-compatible OR clearly breaking

## Checklist

- [ ] No new third-party dependencies
- [ ] No app-level logic (UI, persistence, networking) added to the SDK
- [ ] Public API additions documented with `///` doc comments
